title: Principal Radiologist at Boehringer Ingelheim India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Boehringer Ingelheim India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Boehringer Ingelheim India in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India:
Boehringer Ingelheim India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India!
